actions.value:
My suggestion right now is to use an external wallet, such as Metamask, to gain access to your token, since we had a couple of bugs with BNB Smart Chain we will fix in the next release, so you can't currently create token wallets under BNB Smart Chain.

Here the steps:


For Inside  Edge wallet

Open your Edge app
Search the ethereum wallet, open it, tap Request and check if the address the same you sent the funds to (the address you pasted in Binance Withdraw).

In Wallets list, long press on your Etherem wallet with that address.

press raw key, You will need to write do the information next to the "Raw Key" . Now repeat but press Master Private Key and manually copy that string.

You will need this information for the next steps



Step in metamask (Desktop)

Follow the steps here to install Metamask on your Desktop and use the BNB Smart Chain network: https://academy.binance.com/en/articles/connecting-metamask-to-binance-smart-chain


Once you have made the metamask BSC wallet you will need to import your RAW key or Private Key from Edge.

On Metamask Desktop, tap on the Circle Icon upper right, tap Import, paste the Private key you copied from Edge


After you import your wallet, you will need to go to https://bscscan.com/token/0x55d398326f99059ff775485246999027b3197955?a=0x88cba3383f217133541727e80813c1c9f672de5d
​

You will need to click add to web 3 wallet

You find this in the profile summary  of the crypto you sent. 



This will add the token to your wallet and the balance. 


Please let us know if you have more questions.

​

My suggestion right now is to use an external wallet, such as Metamask, to gain access to your token, since we had a couple of bugs with BNB Smart Chain we will fix in the next release, so you can't currently create token wallets under BNB Smart Chain.

Here the steps:

For Inside  Edge wallet
Open your Edge app
Search the ethereum wallet, open it, tap Request and check if the address the same you sent the funds to (the address you pasted in Binance Withdraw).
In Wallets list, long press on your Etherem wallet with that address.
press raw key, You will need to write do the information next to the "Raw Key" . Now repeat but press Master Private Key and manually copy that string.
You will need this information for the next steps


Step in metamask (Desktop)
Follow the steps here to install Metamask on your Desktop and use the BNB Smart Chain network: https://academy.binance.com/en/articles/connecting-metamask-to-binance-smart-chain

Once you have made the metamask BSC wallet you will need to import your RAW key or Private Key from Edge.
On Metamask Desktop, tap on the Circle Icon upper right, tap Import, paste the Private key you copied from Edge

After you import your wallet, you will need to go to https://bscscan.com/token/0x55d398326f99059ff775485246999027b3197955?a=0x88cba3383f217133541727e80813c1c9f672de5d
​
You will need to click add to web 3 wallet
You find this in the profile summary  of the crypto you sent. 



This will add the token to your wallet and the balance. 

Please let us know if you have more questions.
​
